title: To establish a pilot program for use by U.S. Customs and Border Protection at land ports of entry along the Arizona border to assess the use of artificial intelligence through an anomaly detection algorithm, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the Subcommittee on Border Security and Enforcement.
summary: This AI policy would implement a pilot program at Arizona border land ports to test an anomaly detection algorithm using artificial intelligence, likely to enhance border security. The program aims to assess the effectiveness of AI in this specific context.

title: Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act
action: Referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, and in addition to the Committee on Foreign Affairs, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Data Center Moratorium Act aims to temporarily halt the construction of new artificial intelligence data centers to address environmental concerns and infrastructure impact. The exact details and specifics of the moratorium are unknown due to the lack of available description.

title: Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
summary: The Small Business Artificial Intelligence Advancement Act is a policy that aims to support small businesses in developing and utilizing artificial intelligence technology. This policy likely seeks to provide resources, funding, or regulations to help small businesses keep up with AI advancements.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: This document outlines a plan to assess risks related to the potential terrorist use of generative artificial intelligence. The Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act aims to identify and mitigate potential security threats from this emerging technology.

title: To require artificial intelligence chatbot providers to provide data privacy and security, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
summary: This policy aims to require companies providing artificial intelligence chatbots to prioritize data privacy and security. It also includes other unspecified purposes or measures to regulate AI chatbot providers.

title: Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026
action: Referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology, and in addition to the Committee on Energy and Commerce, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
summary: The Artificial Intelligence Environmental Impacts Act of 2026 aims to address the environmental consequences of artificial intelligence technology. Its details are currently unavailable, but it likely seeks to regulate AI to minimize its ecological footprint.

title: Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act
action: Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee (Amended) by Voice Vote.
summary: The "Protecting Families from AI Data Center Energy Costs Act" is a proposed bill aimed at addressing the high energy costs associated with AI data centers. If passed, it would likely help reduce the financial burden of these energy costs on families.

title: Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.
summary: The Aging with Artificial Intelligence Act of 2026 is a policy aimed at addressing the intersection of aging and artificial intelligence. It likely focuses on implementing regulations or guidelines to ensure AI is used in a way that supports and benefits seniors.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs.
summary: This policy, the "Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act", aims to promote and facilitate the use of artificial intelligence in the financial services industry. The act likely seeks to create an environment that fosters innovation and growth in AI adoption for financial services.

title: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
action: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 619.
summary: This law aims to facilitate the development and use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology within the financial sector. It is designed to remove regulatory barriers and encourage innovative applications of AI in finance.

title: Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 35 - 0.
summary: The Protecting Consumers from Deceptive AI Act aims to safeguard consumers from false or misleading information and practices related to artificial intelligence. The policy aims to establish standards and regulations to ensure transparency and trustworthiness in AI interactions with consumers.

title: To amend the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 to require the Director of the Office of Science and Technology Policy to establish a prize competition program relating to artificial intelligence, and for other purposes.
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This proposed law aims to update the National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020 by requiring a prize competition program related to artificial intelligence. The legislation also includes other provisions.

title: Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026
action: Referred to the House Committee on Science, Space, and Technology.
summary: This policy document likely outlines guidelines for managing risks associated with artificial intelligence. The Federal Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Act of 2026 aims to establish a framework for regulating and mitigating potential AI-related dangers.

title: Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act
action: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
summary: The Generative AI Terrorism Risk Assessment Act is a policy that aims to assess and mitigate the risk of terrorism facilitated by generative AI technology. This act likely focuses on the potential dangers of AI-generated content that could inspire or facilitate terrorist activities.

title: NSF AI Education Act of 2025
action: Ordered to be Reported in the Nature of a Substitute (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 33 - 0.
summary: The NSF AI Education Act of 2025 is a policy aimed at supporting AI education, although a detailed description of its objectives and specifics is not available. Its name implies the legislation will likely provide funding or resources for AI-related educational programs and initiatives.

title: READ AI Models Act

summary: The READ AI Models Act is a policy that presumably requires developers or users of Artificial Intelligence (AI) models to implement readability or interpretability features to make these models more understandable. title: LIFT AI Act

summary: The SBA Artificial Intelligence Utilization Act of 2026 is a policy document that aims to guide the use of artificial intelligence within the Small Business Administration.
